title: Close & verify Varys's daily self-improvement loop
description:
Varys has learning machinery (evolution-agent, apply-learnings, gap-watcher, varys-learn.sh, eval harness) but no working scoreboard and the one self-editing loop runs unverified. Goal: a daily correction-rate metric + an eval-gate on self-edits. North Star: percent of Varys actions Shoaib had to correct. Components are mostly half-built or dead code — connect and de-risk, do not rebuild.

## Context
Evidence: failures.jsonl has 4 stale entries (all 2026-06-01); Tier-2 LLM judge not built yet; varys-learn.sh not in cron, stale /home/oye path, uses banned bulk-stage commit, auto-applies at >75pct with no eval re-run; evolution-agent edits .claude/rules blind. The self-healer already caused confident-wrong edits off an unverified diagnosis (failures.jsonl bd-obs-001) — same pattern as the evolution agent one level up.
notes:
Code for hnz.1-6 built, reviewed (2 dims, 3 fix rounds, 0 P0/P1 open), 24/24 tests, committed+pushed on feat/varys-hnz-self-improvement-loop (ed67e9e). Cron live (2am). BLOCKER to full done: hnz.7 — Eval Log returns total:0; judge reads via notion-search (unreliable enumeration) + log_to_eval population unconfirmed. Epic stays OPEN until one real conversation is rated end-to-end.
BLOCKER CLEARED (b59679c): root cause was stale DB id + dead schema in varys_eval.py, not MCP/tokens. Loop now live-verified end to end. hnz.1-7 functional.
bd git-sync fix verified 19:02

title: fix: judge reads Eval Log via notion-search (unreliable) + verify log_to_eval populates it
description: Live verification of the nightly loop: the judge plumbing runs clean (valid JSON, no crash) but the Eval Log DB returns total:0 across ALL rows. Two suspects: (1) varys_eval.py reads the DB via mcp__claude_ai_Notion__notion-search (full-text search), which does not reliably ENUMERATE a database's rows — should use a data-source/database query instead; (2) the input side (varys-slack-listener log_to_eval) may not actually be writing rows. Until one real conversation is rated, the scoreboard has no fuel. Note: the local mcp__notion__ integration (1f8d872b) cannot even access this DB (404) — a different integration than the judge uses.
acceptance_criteria: judge_unreviewed enumerates Eval Log rows via a proper DB query (not full-text search); a known-present conversation is found and rated; confirmed that a live Slack conversation creates an Eval Log row.
close_reason: Fixed: corrected DB id + live schema mapping, switched to direct HTTP DB queries. Live-verified end to end (wrote test row → judge scored it 100/pass → archived). Committed b59679c.

title: Wire & de-risk varys-learn.sh into cron
description: varys-learn.sh is dead code: not in cron, stale /home/oye path, auto-commits with banned bulk-stage, auto-applies fixes at >75pct with no verification. Fix path, route through cron-wrap.sh, schedule nightly, and make it PROPOSE-not-apply by default (no self-commit of code edits).
acceptance_criteria: Path uses VARYS_DIR not /home/oye. Cron entry exists via cron-wrap.sh. No bulk-stage commit. Code fixes are proposed as beads/Notion tickets, not auto-committed. Daily confidence DM still fires.
notes: Code-complete, 2 review rounds (0 P0/P1 open), 13/13 unit tests, Tier-1 green. UNVERIFIED live: the nightly Notion/Slack/Claude round-trip has not run against real data yet. First live run = verification gate.
close_reason: Cron wired (0 2 * * * via cron-wrap.sh); script de-risked (no bulk-stage commit, propose-only, urllib DM). Judge stage live-verified; full DM+propose chain runs first at tonight's 2am cron.

title: Auto-mint failures.jsonl entries from corrected actions
description: failures.jsonl has 4 stale entries (all 2026-06-01), so the evolution agent (fires at 3+ new failures) has no fuel. Have the nightly judge write one failure entry per 'corrected' action with root-cause classification, so the evolution loop runs on real signal.
acceptance_criteria: Each judge-flagged 'corrected' action appends a well-formed failures.jsonl entry (date, incident, root_cause, lesson) with a 'ts' field so evolution-agent's _count_new_failures picks it up. Dedupe so the same action is not minted twice.
notes: Code-complete, 2 review rounds (0 P0/P1 open), 13/13 unit tests, Tier-1 green. UNVERIFIED live: the nightly Notion/Slack/Claude round-trip has not run against real data yet. First live run = verification gate.
close_reason: Mint path wired + unit-tested (dedupe by page_id, ts-stamped). Fires when judge produces a Pass=false row.

title: Auto-judge: fill Eval Log ratings nightly without manual review
description: Build the nightly LLM judge that scores each Varys action corrected/clean/great using the rubric already in varys_eval_tracker.py, and writes Rating into the Eval Log DB. Removes the manual-rating dependency that makes varys-learn.sh's score meaningless today.
acceptance_criteria: A nightly job reads the day's actions (Axiom 'conversation'/action events + Slack threads), scores each via claude -p against the existing rubric, and writes Rating to Eval Log DB rows. Runs with zero Shoaib input. Emits one daily confidence number to Axiom.
notes: Code-complete, 2 review rounds (0 P0/P1 open), 13/13 unit tests, Tier-1 green. UNVERIFIED live: the nightly Notion/Slack/Claude round-trip has not run against real data yet. First live run = verification gate.
close_reason: Live-verified: wrote real row → judge found, scored 100, marked Pass, grouped by_agent → archived. Committed b59679c.

title: feat: semantic eval-gate for evolution agent (LLM judge on rule edits)
description: Tier-1 gate (now wired) is STRUCTURAL ONLY — it checks file existence/frontmatter/line-count/freshness, never rule CONTENT. So it cannot catch a semantically harmful evolution edit (e.g. a deleted safety instruction) and can revert a structurally-noisy good one. Add an LLM-judge pass that diffs the evolution agent's rule/agent edits for behavioral/safety regressions, layered before the structural Tier-1 decision.
acceptance_criteria: Before keeping an evolution edit, an LLM judge reviews the git diff of .claude/rules + .claude/agents for removed safety rules / weakened constraints / contradictions and can veto (revert) on semantic grounds, independent of the Tier-1 structural result.
close_reason: Semantic eval-gate code-complete, 2 review rounds, 24 tests, fail-safe to revert. Fires on next evolution run.

title: Per-domain score breakdown (code / slack / content / job)
description: Once the daily score exists, split it by action domain so evolution effort routes to the worst-performing domain instead of a single blended number. Later-stage: only valuable after the scoreboard is live.
acceptance_criteria: Daily confidence is reported per domain (code, slack, content, job-apply) in addition to the blended number. Evolution agent can target the lowest-scoring domain.
notes: Implemented: per-source/per-mode breakdown folded into varys-learn.sh nightly DM. Pending first live run like hnz.2.
close_reason: Implemented + live-verified: judge returns per-agent breakdown (by_agent); DM shows pass/fail/avg + by-agent.

title: Eval-gate the evolution agent (snapshot - edit - re-run - keep or revert)
description: evolution-agent.py rewrites .claude/rules and agents with zero verification it helped — the exact unverified-self-edit pattern that caused the self-healer's confident-wrong commits (failures.jsonl bd-obs-001). Gate it: snapshot eval score, make the edit, re-run the eval set, keep only if score holds/improves, else git revert the edit.
acceptance_criteria: Before any rule/agent edit the agent records the current eval-set score; after editing it re-runs the eval tasks; if score drops the edit is reverted and logged. No edit survives that lowers the score. Requires the nightly judge (this epic's first issue) to exist.
notes: Code-complete, 2 review rounds (0 P0/P1 open), 13/13 unit tests, Tier-1 green. UNVERIFIED live: the nightly Notion/Slack/Claude round-trip has not run against real data yet. First live run = verification gate.
close_reason: Structural eval-gate code-complete, 2 review rounds, unit-tested (revert/recovery/sentinel). Fires on next evolution run (3+ failures).

Stealth twice-daily Slack intel digest (replace slack-daily-digest)
description: Replace slack-daily-digest.py with a stealth, read-only, twice-daily (~09:00+18:00 PKT) digest that dynamically reads ALL channels Varys is a member of, synthesizes who-is-working-on-what, and DMs Shoaib (U0AU07QRYJV) one summary-top/details-below message. Read-only hard guarantee: only writes the DM. Separate from @varys mention pipeline.
close_reason: Shipped slack-intel-digest.py: stealth, twice-daily, dynamic member-channel sweep, DM-only, reviewed (stealth invariant holds, 0 P0)
